problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
